topIndia.summary: The largest US health insurer plans to invest $3 billion in AI over 2026 and 2027. UnitedHealth executives say they’re seeing a 2-to-1 return, as AI automates cumbersome manual processes and makes workers more efficient. Executives say the technology can reduce friction for pa…

events.title: Nobel Prize winner John Jumper quits Google DeepMind after nearly a decade; set to join Anthropic
